2314570.name: 禁止过分投入 演示版(Love Too Easily Demo)
2314570.description:
[About This Game]

You are tired of ambiguous flirts and lukewarm romances.
You wake up with the bright sunbeams and the sound of chirping.
Right when the hangover came and the fragmentary memories of last night came to mind.
And a kiss with someone... a kiss?

[Synopsis]

Though tired of flirts and romances, it seems lovestruck Yeonwoo has again fallen in love.
The problem is that she dosen't know who she kissed. Very serious situation.
Meet the suspects with Yeonwoo for a day and collect clues.
Young romance of Yeonwoo depends on your choice and detection.

[Story made with your own choices]

Where to go, who to talk to, how to answer, etc...
Depending on your choice, the story progresses, and the hints will be collected vary.
Depending on how specific the hint is, the success of the reasoning is determined and can have a significant impact on the ending.
Find out the guy she kissed who changes every version of the play.
Experience all 11 main endings and other hidden endings!

[Results that change with one single click]

Watch out for the qte button appearing at the game!
The result of success and failure has no same qte. Each of the different videos will be played based on your failures and successes!

[Mini-games fully synchronized with the video]

Enjoy mini-games that are closely linked to the video.
The clues obtained when finishing a mini-game can be used as an important clue later or have an impact on the hidden ending.

[You're the one I kissed last night!]

If you've overcome multiple adversities and obstacles that prevent you from finding out the guy she kissed, and managed to select the final suspect,
disarm the suspects with your shining reasoning.
Will Yeonwoo be able to find the guy she kissed and get the ending she wants?

[Features]

  • Interactive Movie: Stories and endings that are clearly reflected through choices.
  • Algorithm: Kissing different characters that change in each play.
  • Minigames: Colorful mini-games fully synchronized with the video.
  • Solving the mystery: All the clues collected with your clicks go into the diary! Collect achievements and a lookbook.

[ABOUT DEMO]

The demo version is a part of the opening of the whole game.
You can try how the game works and how fun it is.
The exciting stories that will unfold in the future will be available in the full version soon.
If you leave some valuable feedback(e.g.‘hope there was 000 function', ‘hope 000 would be improved’), we will consider them as much as possible and come back with a fun game.
2314570.supported_languages:
英语, 日语, 韩语*, 简体中文, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
